rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Judgment Enforcing Liabilty On Bond
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 17, 2015, line 1. OTHER PHYLLIS VOISENAT Motion For Judgment Enforcing Liabilty On Bond Hearing Required. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ESPERANZA LI VS. BRADEN MORE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Good Faith Settlement Determination
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 17, 2015, line 2. CROSS DEFENDANT THE BRANNAN OWNERS ASSOCIATION'S Motion For Good Faith Settlement Determination continued to April 14, 2015. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of Clay Coelho Declaration to department 501 no later than march 23, 2015 by 4:00 p.m. with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL YOUNESSIAN VS. JOHN LUNDY et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 17, 2015, line 3. DEFENDANT JOHN LUNDY's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege a cause of action for fraud with requisite specificity as to each element. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PATRICK SCOFIELD VS. BRUCE ALLEN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Compel Defendant Bruce Allen To Provide Responses To Plaintiff Scofield/S Form Interrogatories General, Set One, Special Interrogatories, Set One, And Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 17, 2015, line 4. PLAINTIFF PATRICK SCOFIELD'S Motion To Compel Defendant Bruce Allen To Provide Responses To Plaintiff Scofield/S Form Interrogatories General, Set One, Special Interrogatories, Set One, And Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One And Request For Sanctions is GRANTED. Non-opposition filed. Defendant shall provide responses to discovery at issue within 10 days of notice of entry of order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOSE CERON VS. SALLY LIU ET AL

DEFENDANT SALLY LIU'S Motion To Dismiss Complaint And For Judgment On The Pleadings continued to April 17, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFRO 2.6C and provide a courtesy copy of the operative complaint to department 501 no later than March 27, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 17, 2015, line 6. rulings.Case Title: GURSON S DANG VS. CHARLES RHODES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Set Vacate Default And Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 17, 2015, line 8. DEFENDANT DANIEL SOLINA'S Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Set Vacate Default And Judgment DENIED. Moving party failed to sustained burden under CCP 473(b). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RAYMOND CHOY VS. KAI CHEONG CHIU ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 17, 2015, line 9. DEFENDANT KAI CHIU'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend to clearly indicated whether this tenancy is subject to SFRO and if that is, then, how the operative notice complies with SFRO. See Notice and Paragraph 14 od Complaint. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LA SALLE PRESERVATION LIMITED PARTNERSAHIP VS. RONESHA ALLEN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 17, 2015, line 10. DEFENDANT RONESHA ALLEN'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND DENIED. Defendant fails to sustained burden under CCP 473(b). = (501/REQ)
